name: thinking-skills
description: A domain-neutral thinking skills framework with intent routing, method bases, and specialized thinking modes.

interface.shortDescription: Domain-neutral intent routing and thinking modes
interface.longDescription: Use Thinking Skills to route user requests into domain-specific thinking modes for content creation, technical deep dives, emotional support, and future life decision, creative, learning, and business workflows.
defaultPrompt: I have an idea and want to think it through.
Help me decide what thinking mode this request needs.
I want to write something, analyze something technical, or sort out an emotional issue.
